question.label: Clearer criteria
question.name: When you say 'clearer criteria,' what specifically feels missing?
question.description: Follows his stated need without diagnosing emotion; surfaces the concrete clarity gap underneath the frustration.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: He names a concrete clarity deficit: he believes he can own bigger direction but lacks the authority to do it. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'real authority' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
